name: AscoBreastCancerGuidelineRecommendationR31TnbcEligible
title: Offer anthracycline and taxane regimen for eligible TNBC
description: Choose neoadjuvant chemotherapy strategy for triple-negative breast cancer.

action.description: Offer an anthracycline-containing and taxane-containing neoadjuvant regimen for TNBC with clinically node-positive disease and-or at least T1c disease.

documentation.citation: Offer anthracycline- and taxane-containing neoadjuvant therapy for TNBC with node-positive disease or at least T1c disease.
